name: AutomationBuilder
description: The Automation Builder (Workflows) page for the qontinui-web app, scoped to the active project. With a project selected (Spec CI seeds an empty 'spec-ci-fixture' project and threads ?project=<id> so the <RequireProject pageName="Workflows"> gate clears), the page renders its real builder landing for an empty project: a project-named page header, the Automation Library panel, and a 'No Workflow Selected' empty editor with a Create New Workflow call to action. Asserts the landing structure of an empty project (no workflows authored yet). Workflow rows and editor content are data-driven and not asserted. Read-only: no transition mutates the fixture project (workflow creation is Unlock 2).

states.name: Project-scoped page header
states.description: The builder header names the active project. Spec CI selects the empty 'spec-ci-fixture' project, so the h1 reflects that fixture name deterministically.

assertions.description: h1 page header reflects the active (fixture) project name.
Automation Library panel heading is present alongside the builder.

states.name: Empty editor landing
states.description: With no workflow authored in the fixture project, the editor pane shows a 'No Workflow Selected' empty state with a Create New Workflow action — the correct start-state for a fresh project.

assertions.description: 'No Workflow Selected' empty-editor heading is rendered.
Empty-editor heading reads 'No Workflow Selected' (role+text cross-check).
Create New Workflow action is present in the empty editor.
